message:
fix(robot): remove text truncation from markdown output

Same fix as bv/markdown.go - agent-consumed output should not
truncate titles or messages. Token savings should come from
showing fewer items, not destroying information.

- Remove 50-char title truncation for bead titles
- Remove 60-char message truncation for alerts in compact mode

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
